There are two cables.
Hello! Welcome to the Tech Store. How can I help you?
Hi. I need a new keyboard. Is there a good one here?
Yes! There are two keyboards on the table. There are also headphones next to them.
Great. Is there a charger for my phone too?
There is no charger today, sorry. But there is one next week.
No problem. I take the keyboard and the headphones. Thank you!
There are two cables behind the screen.
Is there a charger here?
There are headphones for my video calls.

Hi, this is Estephano. I am a tech student, so I have a lot of devices. On my desk, there is a computer and a big screen. There is a keyboard and a mouse. There are two cables and one charger for my phone. There are also headphones for my video calls. On the screen, there is a folder with all my projects. My desk is full of technology, but I like it. I work and I study here every day!

Hello, this is Sara from Tech Store. I call about your order. Good news: there are two items ready for you. There is a new keyboard and there are also headphones. There is no charger today, so it comes next week. Please come to the store on Monday. There is a parking space in front of the door. Thank you, and have a great day!

Estephano sets up his desk. First, he puts the computer on the desk. Then he connects the screen with a cable. Next, he adds the keyboard and the mouse. After that, he plugs in the charger for his phone. Finally, he puts on his headphones and starts to work.
